data_policy: Solved exemplars are drawn from a non-test split. The public view contains only artifacts available to the matching direct condition. Candidates are exemplar answers for the few-shot prompt and are not drawn from the test_public split.

theory Left {
  sort L0
  const l0 : L0
  func lf0 : L0 -> L0
  func lf1 : L0 -> L0
  func ldf0 : L0 -> L0
  pred LP0 : L0
  pred LP1 : L0
  pred LD0 : L0
  axiom left_step_0: forall x:L0. LP0(x) -> LP1(lf0(x))
  axiom left_step_1: forall x:L0. LP1(x) -> LP0(lf1(x))
  axiom left_decoy_0: forall x:L0. LD0(x) -> LD0(ldf0(x))
  theorem left_cycle_0: forall x:L0. LP0(x) -> LP0(lf1(lf0(x)))
  theorem left_cycle_1: forall x:L0. LP1(x) -> LP1(lf0(lf1(x)))
  fact left_seed_0: LP0(l0)
  fact left_decoy_seed_0: LD0(l0)
}
theory Right {
  sort R0
  const r0 : R0
  func rf0 : R0 -> R0
  func rf1 : R0 -> R0
  func rdf0 : R0 -> R0
  pred RP0 : R0
  pred RP1 : R0
  pred RD0 : R0
  axiom right_step_0: forall y:R0. RP0(y) -> RP1(rf0(y))
  axiom right_step_1: forall y:R0. RP1(y) -> RP0(rf1(y))
  axiom right_decoy_0: forall y:R0. RD0(y) -> RD0(rdf0(y))
  fact right_seed_0: RP0(r0)
  fact right_decoy_seed_0: RD0(r0)
}
